home_about_me: I am a full-stack web and mobile developer passionate about creating web applications. I have solid experience in front-end and back-end development, as well as database design. I am always looking for new challenges and opportunities to learn and grow as a developer.
dev_fullstack: Full stack web and mobile developer
about_content: Starting my career in 2022 in the world of application development, and more specifically in web development, I have developed several applications that are as solid, robust, and flexible as each other. These applications have allowed me to gain solid experience in application development, whether web or mobile, and have also enabled me to declare myself as a full stack developer.
presentation_text: Mr. Le-duc. I just visited your portfolio and I would like to discuss with you !
baccalaureat_d_desc: I completed my secondary education at the __Lycée__ __Classique__ __d'Édea__ (Littoral Region), where I obtained my __Baccalauréat__ __D__ before settling in Douala-Cameroun to pursue my higher education.
bts_desc: Once my Baccalauréat obtained and shortly after moving to the city of __Douala__ (__Cameroon__), I decided to continue my studies at the __I__nstitut __U__niversitaire et __S__tratégique de l' __E__stuaire (__IUEs__ __/__ __Insam__) in Ndokoti, where I obtained my __BTS__ after two years of study in software engineering.
bachelor_degree_desc: After obtaining my __BTS__ in the field where I had always wanted to work, I told myself, << if I already have a __BTS__ in the field where I planned to work since I was little, why not continue up to the bachelor's degree? >> And so a year later, I obtained my __Bachelor__ __degree__ __in__ __software__ __engineering__ as planned.
internship_al_consulting_desc: I completed an internship at __AL-Consulting__ __Sarl__ where I learned to better use computer tools, specifically the software we used there to develop applications efficiently, namely __Visual__ __Studio__ __Code__. I also learned the rules of database creation and management using __SQL__ and also learned to use best practices in __Javascript__ and __PHP__.
employee_soif_desc: Admittedly, the __Soif__ company does not operate in my field (software engineering), but there I had the opportunity to experience what the professional world is like and thus improve my soft skills and my know-how.
internship_mt_consulting: Professional internship at MT Consulting Sarl
internship_mt_consulting_desc: At __MT__ __Consulting__ __Sarl__, I discovered __python__ and then learned to handle some simple modules of the __Odoo__ ERP.
internship_nala_security_consulting: Professional internship at NALA SECURITY CONSULTING
internship_nala_security_consulting_desc:
At __NALA__ __SECURITY__ __CONSULTING__, I used my expertise and the knowledge I already had to develop the company's web application.
This application was not just a simple reflection of the services offered by the company, but also an application where users could interact with each other and with the company, and also stay updated on the latest news concerning it.
